note: FlexSlider exposes a config entity (optionset), an image field formatter and a Views style (both in bundled submodules), a config settings object, and an external JS library requirement. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) since they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, what config entity does the FlexSlider module use to store slider settings, and what are its config objects named? How would I create one in code?
evals.expected_output: The `flexslider` config entity (an 'optionset', config prefix `optionset`, so config objects are flexslider.optionset.{id}). Create with \Drupal\flexslider\Entity\Flexslider::create(['id'=>..., 'label'=>...])->save(); create() merges defaults.

evals.prompt: I want to display a multi-value image field as a FlexSlider slideshow on a node. Which module/formatter do I use and what is a key restriction on the field?
evals.expected_output: Enable flexslider_fields and set the field's display format to FlexSlider (formatter id `flexslider`, extends core ImageFormatter). It only applies to multi-value image fields.

evals.prompt: How do I display Views results in a FlexSlider on a Drupal site, and what does the style let me choose?
evals.expected_output: Enable flexslider_views and set the view's Format to FlexSlider (style plugin id `flexslider`). You choose an optionset, an optional caption field, and a container element ID. Do not also set the image field's own formatter to FlexSlider.

evals.prompt: FlexSlider isn't working because the JavaScript library is missing. Where must the FlexSlider library be installed, and how can I add it with Composer?
evals.expected_output: The external JS library must live at [DRUPAL ROOT]/libraries/flexslider (files jquery.flexslider-min.js, flexslider.css). It is suggested via Composer as woothemes/flexslider:~2.0 (or install the woocommerce/flexslider library package).

evals.prompt: Which optionset options do I set to make FlexSlider render a multi-item carousel instead of a single-slide-at-a-time slider?
evals.expected_output: Set a non-zero itemWidth and itemMargin (optionally minItems/maxItems) in the optionset to create a carousel.

evals.prompt: In a FlexSlider optionset, which options control the animation type (fade vs slide) and the auto-advancing slideshow, and what are their defaults?
evals.expected_output: animation (default 'fade', or 'slide') sets the transition; slideshow (default true) auto-advances; slideshowSpeed (default 7000ms) sets the delay; animationSpeed (default 600ms) the transition duration.

evals.prompt: What permission gates administering FlexSlider optionsets and settings on a Drupal site?
evals.expected_output: The single 'administer flexslider' permission gates all optionset admin routes and the advanced settings form.

evals.prompt: What is the admin path and route for managing FlexSlider optionsets, and where are the debug/CSS toggles?
evals.expected_output: Optionsets are managed at /admin/config/media/flexslider (route entity.flexslider.collection, the module's configure route). Debug (unminified JS) and CSS toggles are on the advanced settings form at /admin/config/media/flexslider/advanced (flexslider.settings).
